allow: Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -u root -pBishnu@17 thehotelmate -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM property LIKE '%subtype%';")

Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -u root -pBishnu@17 thehotelmate -e "SELECT id, name, business_type, business_subtype, property_status, city FROM property WHERE business_type='Accommodation' AND \(property_status='1' OR property_status='2'\) AND city='Jaipur';")
Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -u root -pBishnu@17 thm -e "SELECT id, name, business_type, property_status, city FROM property WHERE city LIKE '%aipur%' LIMIT 10;")

Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -u root -pBishnu@17 thm -e "SELECT p.id, p.name, p.image_url, i.url, i.image_type FROM property p LEFT JOIN image i ON i.property_id = p.id WHERE p.city='Jaipur' AND p.business_type='Accommodation' AND \(p.property_status='1' OR p.property_status='2'\) LIMIT 5;")
Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -u root -pBishnu@17 thm -e "SELECT p.id, p.name, p.image_url FROM property p WHERE p.city='Jaipur' AND p.business_type='Accommodation' LIMIT 5;")
Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -u root -pBishnu@17 thm -e "SELECT id, name, image_url, background_image_url FROM property WHERE business_type='Accommodation' AND image_url IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;")
